positive: Minimalist stylized woodland animal silhouette, specifically a fox and a deer interacting peacefully in a stylized grove. The scene should have clean, sharp lines and strong contrasts, suitable for a monochrome print design. Use a negative space aesthetic with forest elements like delicate ferns, glowing fireflies, and abstract crystalline leaves incorporated into the background. Composition must be centered and balanced. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and clean vector graphics, emphasizing high contrast black on white. Detailed, graphic, high resolution, perfect for apparel print.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blur, artifacts, bad anatomy, grainy, noise, low detail, messy, photo, realistic photography, color gradient, poor composition
